insight: Forest Young's Redaction typeface (OFL-free, from https://redaction.us/) ships in 8 grades from 10 (clean) to 100 (heavily over-photocopied). For any product with an intensity/severity/escalation enum (paranoia level, threat level, urgency, mood), the Redaction grade can map 1:1 to the enum value, so typography literally degrades as the metric rises. The font itself becomes a design-system primitive. Particularly powerful for satire/conspiracy/horror/documentary aesthetics where the document's degradation IS the storytelling.
